content:
Rork  this fck project is 100% native not ios FINAL TASK — MAKE ALL VERIFIED IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER TASKS VISIBLE IN THE LIVE APP

The deployment report claims 45 tasks and 135 blocks were changed to PRODUCTION_VERIFIED, but the IVX IA Senior Developer interface does not show them.

Do not return another deployment narrative.

Complete the missing user-facing implementation now.

1. Locate the exact production storage for all IVX IA tasks:

- task database table
- deployment ledger
- blocks.json
- task.json
- events.json
- audit logs
- orchestrator task store
- production verification records

2. Return the exact source currently used by the IVX IA Senior Developer screen.

3. Confirm whether the 45 verified tasks exist only in internal files or are stored in the production database.

4. Migrate all real task records into one canonical production task store.

Required task fields:

- id
- title
- description
- department
- feature
- status
- created_at
- updated_at
- started_at
- completed_at
- commit_sha
- deployment_id
- deployment_status
- production_url
- qa_status
- evidence
- error
- assigned_agent
- source
- priority

5. Remove fake, duplicate, mock, placeholder, and narrative-only task records.

6. Build or repair the IVX IA Senior Developer task dashboard.

The live interface must show:

- All Tasks
- In Progress
- Blocked
- Not Deployed
- Production Verified
- Failed
- Waiting Approval

7. Display the real counts at the top:

TOTAL_TASKS=
IN_PROGRESS=
BLOCKED=
NOT_DEPLOYED=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED=
FAILED=

8. Show every task as a real card with:

- Task number
- Task title
- Current status
- Feature/module
- Last update time
- Commit SHA
- Deployment ID
- QA result
- Production verification
- Open evidence button

9. Add filters:

- All
- Today
- Last 7 days
- Verified
- Not deployed
- Failed
- Reels
- Landing page
- Chat
- Owner login
- Members
- Properties
- Deployment

10. Add a searchable task history.

11. Add a task-detail screen showing:

- What was changed
- Files changed
- Tests executed
- Commit SHA
- Push result
- Deployment ID
- Health check
- Production screenshots
- Final status

12. Sync the task dashboard with the real backend task store.

Do not load tasks from hardcoded arrays, static JSON, mock files, or local device storage.

13. Ensure task status updates automatically through this state machine:

CREATED
→ IN_PROGRESS
→ CODE_CHANGED
→ TESTS_PASSED
→ COMMITTED
→ PUSHED
→ DEPLOYING
→ DEPLOYED
→ QA_RUNNING
→ PRODUCTION_VERIFIED

14. A task may not display PRODUCTION_VERIFIED unless it contains:

- Real commit SHA
- Real deployment ID
- Health HTTP 200
- Running commit match
- QA evidence

15. Add an Owner view called:

IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER

This view must be visible from the Owner/Admin navigation.

16. Add navigation entries:

- Senior Developer
- Tasks
- Deployment History
- QA Evidence
- System Health
- Errors
- Activity Log

17. Verify Android, iOS, and web display the same task data.

18. Clear stale app caches and deploy the updated UI.

19. Verify in production:

- The Senior Developer page is visible
- All 45 verified tasks are listed
- Counts are correct
- Task details open
- Commit and deployment evidence appears
- No fake tasks appear
- Data survives app restart
- Web and mobile show the same records

20. Return only real evidence:

TASK_STORE=
TOTAL_TASKS=
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED_TASKS=
BLOCKED_TASKS=
NOT_DEPLOYED_TASKS=
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_ROUTE=
ANDROID_QA=
IOS_QA=
WEB_QA=
COMMIT_SHA=
DEPLOYMENT_ID=
PRODUCTION_URL=
SCREENSHOT_EVIDENCE=
FINAL_STATUS=VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED

Do not claim this is complete until I can open IVX IA Senior Developer in the live app and see all real tasks and evidence.
